flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Wharton County Junior College rose 48% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.6k → $3.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wharton County Junior College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.4k → $3.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wharton County Junior College fell 27% between 2006 and 2009 (22.5% → 16.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Wharton County Junior College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.9k → $5.9k).
